Video.summary: Divide up your room in style with a stunning room divider. Take a spare t-shirt and give an old chair a mod makeover. Plus give your pad a hot new vibe with this lamp made from plastic cups.

Image.alt: She's Crafty: Livin' Tha Life

Video.summary: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we’re all about the super, happy, fun time cuteness of Amigurumi — crochet and knit toys. Learn how to crochet an adorable Loaf Kitty and sweet Sloth, plus tips for toy knitting success!
